series_metadata.series_title: TB Test Reports & Accredited Herd Records
series_metadata.series_description: Tuberculosis testing reports from accredited veterinarians, submitted to Animal Health as required by USDA APHIS. Form VS 6-22

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned and verified as readable. ; Electronic: Retain for 10 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
